scripts.dev:app: node -e "setTimeout(() => require('child_process').spawn('npm', ['run', 'dev'], { cwd: 'skoolis_app', stdio: 'inherit', shell: true }), 2000)"
scripts.start: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail --names "landing,app" --prefix-colors "cyan,magenta" "cd skoolis_landing && npm run start" "cd skoolis_app && npm run start"
